summary: Complete testing of AI Village: The Echoes new features - Commands System, Oracle World Monitor, AI Integrations API, Enhanced CSS 3D First Person View, and Multiplayer Chat input fix. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend FirstPersonView3D loads correctly with 3D perspective rendering, HUD elements, and Commands button showing 21 commands for Sirix-1.
passed_tests: GET /api/commands - Basic user gets limited commands (/help, /commands only)
POST /api/commands/execute - Unknown command returns graceful failure
POST /api/oracle/vision (world_state) - Returns world population, civilizations, economy data
GET /api/integrations/apps?user_id - Shows installed status per user
POST /api/integrations/register - Requires mod+ permissions (403 for basic users)
POST /api/integrations/register - Mod user can register apps (pending_approval status)
POST /api/time/phase - Returns time phase and danger level
frontend_tests_passed: Homepage loads with Enter The Echoes button
Character creation page loads with Name, Background, Traits, Appearance sections
Mode selection page shows First Person and Story Mode options
3D view shows buildings: The Forge, Oracle's Sanctum, Wanderer's Rest, Ancient Library
3D view shows NPCs: Elder Morvain, Lyra the Wanderer, Town Guard
Combat buttons visible: Attack, Block, Magic
Pause menu shows character info, Commands button with badge (21)
Pause menu shows Current Time (DAWN) and Danger level (20%)
critical_code_review_comments: Commands system correctly implements 21 commands for Sirix-1 including /god, /reset_world, /override, /reveal
Permission levels properly enforced: basic(1), advanced(2), admin(3), sirix_1(999)
Oracle World Monitor provides comprehensive world state data including population, guilds, buildings, PvP battles, economy
AI Integrations API has proper permission checks - mod+ required to register apps
FirstPersonView3D uses CSS perspective rendering with 3D structures and NPC sprites
MultiplayerChat input fix confirmed: onKeyDown instead of onKeyPress (line 240)
seed_data_creation: Created test character 'TEST_Sirix_Hero_3D' for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Commands system with 21 commands for Sirix-1 at /api/commands and /api/commands/execute. 2) Oracle World Monitor at /api/oracle/status and /api/oracle/vision with vision_types: world_state, prophecy, player_fate, hidden_truth. 3) AI Integrations API at /api/integrations/* for registering/approving/installing external AI apps. 4) FirstPersonView3D component loads with CSS 3D perspective, NPCs, buildings, HUD. 5) MultiplayerChat onKeyDown fix verified at line 240.
